# daytona_enroll_sms_mfa (Action)

Starts SMS MFA enrollment for the authenticated Daytona user. Daytona returns an enrollment URL during action progress; treat Terraform action output and logs as sensitive.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_enroll_sms_mfa" "example" {
  config {}
}
```
